// ABOUT ME

Software Development with Purpose and Precision

Open to opportunities
  • Bengaluru, India

I am a Computer Science Engineering student at Garden City University with a strong passion for Software Development Engineering (SDE).

I have participated in hackathons, completed industry-recognized certifications, and built projects focused on solving real-world problems. Currently, I am strengthening my skills in Java, Data Structures & Algorithms, Spring Boot, SQL, and modern web technologies to prepare for software engineering internships and full-time opportunities.
